---
title: "Rāg Rāmkali"
subtitle: "*Bajata bīṅa pravīṅa*"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: article
---

::: {.composer-info}
**Composer:** Jñānaraṅga &nbsp;·&nbsp; **Tāl:** Jhāpatāl (Drut)
:::

## Lyrics {.unnumbered}

::: {.lyrics-block}

**Sthāyī**

> bājata bīna pravīna rabāba kinnara  
> gāvata indra darabāra

**Antarā**

> ughaṭata madhura dhuna cahudisa chāyo  
> aura tāna mṛdaṅga dhuṅkāra

**Sanchārī**

> siṃhāsana para baiṭhe surapati  
> nirakha koṭi mahajyota hāra

**Ābhog**

> yaha sabhā ko sāja dekhe saba  
> mana me ānanda pāve apāra

:::

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal" collapse="true"}
## Reading the notation

Jhāpatāl is a 10-beat cycle divided as **2 + 3 + 2 + 3** (vibhāgs marked **X**, **2**, **O**, **3**). Each row below shows **one complete cycle**: the ten columns correspond to beats 1–10, with sam **X** at beat 1, **2** at beat 3, **O** (khālī) at beat 6, and **3** at beat 8. 

The sargam row gives the notes; the bold text row below it gives the lyrics syllables. A dash **-** indicates a held note or empty beat. Brackets $\lb{\cdot}$ denote meend (glide) or grouped notes; superscripts $\sps{\cdot}$ indicate the starting grace note of a glide; $\tr{X}$ denotes a note in the upper octave (tār saptak); $\mn{X}$ denotes a note in the lower octave (mandra saptak).
:::

## Sthāyī {.unnumbered}

::: {.notation-table .jhapatal}

| **X** |   | **2** |   |   | **O** |   | **3** |   |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| - | - | - | - | - | S | S | $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{m}}\mathrm{G}}$ | m | P |
| **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **bā** | **-** | **ja** | **ta** | **bī** |
| $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{n}}\mathrm{d}}$ | - | d | P | P | m | - | $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{n}}\mathrm{d}}$ | - | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ |
| **na** | **-** | **pra** | **vī** | **na** | **ra** | **-** | **bā** | **-** | **ba** |
| $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{n}}\mathrm{d}}$ | - | d | P | - | d | - | d | - | d |
| **ki** | **-** | **nna** | **ra** | **-** | **gā** | **-** | **va** | **-** | **ta** |
| P | - | P | m | m | d | P | n | d | P |
| **i** | **-** | **ndra** | **da** | **ra** | **bā** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** |
| m | G | r | S | $\mn{\mathrm{N}}$ | - | - | - | - | - |
| **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **ra** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** |

:::

## Antarā {.unnumbered}

::: {.notation-table .jhapatal}

| **X** |   | **2** |   |   | **O** |   | **3** |   |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{n}}\mathrm{d}}$ | d | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | - | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ |
| **u** | **gha** | **ṭa** | **ta** | **ma** | **dhu** | **ra** | **dhu** | **-** | **na** |
| $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{r}}$ | $\lb{\sps{\tr{\mathrm{m}}}\tr{\mathrm{G}}}$ | - | $\tr{\mathrm{m}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{G}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{r}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | N | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ |
| **ca** | **hu** | **di** | **-** | **sa** | **chā** | **-** | **yo** | **-** | **-** |
| $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{n}}\mathrm{d}}$ | d | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | - | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ |
| **u** | **gha** | **ṭa** | **ta** | **ma** | **dhu** | **ra** | **dhu** | **-** | **na** |
| $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{r}}$ | $\lb{\sps{\tr{\mathrm{m}}}\tr{\mathrm{G}}}$ | - | $\tr{\mathrm{m}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{G}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{r}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | N | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ |
| **ca** | **hu** | **di** | **-** | **sa** | **chā** | **-** | **yo** | **-** | **-** |
| $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{S}}\mn{\mathrm{N}}}$ | $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{S}}\mn{\mathrm{N}}}$ | S | $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{m}}\mathrm{G}}$ | m | $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{d}}\mathrm{P}}$ | $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{d}}\mathrm{P}}$ | $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{n}}\mathrm{d}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ |
| **au** | **-** | **ra** | **tā** | **-** | **na** | **mṛ** | **da** | **-** | **aṅga** |
| m | G | r | S | $\mn{\mathrm{N}}$ | - | - | - | - | - |
| **dhu** | **-** | **ṅkā** | **-** | **ra** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** |

:::

## Sanchārī {.unnumbered}

::: {.notation-table .jhapatal}

| **X** |   | **2** |   |   | **O** |   | **3** |   |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{P}}\mathrm{d}}$ | - | d | - | d | $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{n}}\mathrm{d}}$ | - | d | P | - |
| **siṃ** | **-** | **hā** | **-** | **sa** | **na** | **-** | **pa** | **ra** | **-** |
| m | - | G | - | P | m | G | r | S | - |
| **bai** | **-** | **ṭhe** | **-** | **-** | **su** | **ra** | **pa** | **ti** | **-** |
| S | r | G | - | G | m | - | m | m | - |
| **ni** | **ra** | **kha** | **-** | **ko** | **ṭi** | **-** | **ma** | **ha** | **-** |
| d | - | P | m | P | m | G | r | - | S |
| **jyo** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **ta** | **hā** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **ra** |

:::

## Ābhog {.unnumbered}

::: {.notation-table .jhapatal}

| **X** |   | **2** |   |   | **O** |   | **3** |   |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| m | m | $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{n}}\mathrm{d}}$ | d | d | d | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | N | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ |
| **ya** | **ha** | **sa** | **bhā** | **ko** | **sā** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **ja** |
| $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | d | N | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\lb{\tr{\mathrm{r}}\mathrm{N}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{N}}\tr{\mathrm{S}}}$ | d | P |
| **de** | **-** | **khe** | **sa** | **ba** | **ma** | **na** | **me** | **-** | **-** |
| m | m | $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{n}}\mathrm{d}}$ | d | d | d | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | N | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ |
| **ya** | **ha** | **sa** | **bhā** | **ko** | **sā** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **ja** |
| $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | d | N | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\lb{\tr{\mathrm{r}}\mathrm{N}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{N}}\tr{\mathrm{S}}}$ | d | P |
| **de** | **-** | **khe** | **sa** | **ba** | **ma** | **na** | **me** | **-** | **-** |
| $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{m}}\mathrm{d}}$ | - | d | - | P | P | d | P | m | P |
| **ā** | **-** | **na** | **-** | **nda** | **pā** | **-** | **ve** | **-** | **a** |
| m | G | r | S | $\mn{\mathrm{N}}$ | - | - | - | - | - |
| **pā** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **ra** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** |

:::```
